per_item.correction: 27/216 (The original answer is correct based on the hint, as there are indeed 27 combinations that result in a sum of 10 when rolling three dice.)
0.03125 (Probability of getting exactly 5 heads in 10 coin flips is the binomial probability P(X=5) = C(10, 5) * (0.5)^10, where C(n, k) is the combination function and C(10, 5) = 252.)

3 weighings (Using a balance scale, you can divide the balls into three groups of four. If the heavy ball is in one group, it will be found after two weighings. If not, the heavy ball must be in the remaining group. Each weighing divides the possibilities into 3 groups, so log_3(12) rounds up to 3.)
Approximately 5730 years (The half-life of Carbon-14 is between 5000 and 6000 years, so it's approximately halfway between these two values.)
Mirabeau B. Lamar (He succeeded Sam Houston as the second president of the Republic of Texas. His first name starts with M.)
The Battle of Plassey took place in 1757 (It was in the mid-18th century, before American independence. The exact year is 1757.)
The ball costs 5 cents. (No change in the answer as the hint confirms the initial calculation.)
It takes the snail 9 days to reach the top. (No change in the answer as the hint confirms the initial calculation.)
